query:
INSERT INTO public.gateway_config_coprocessors (
                tx_sender_address,
                signer_address,
                s3_bucket_url,
                coprocessor_threshold,
                gateway_chain_id,
                gateway_config_address,
                snapshot_block_number,
                snapshot_block_hash
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8)
